item.title: Spotify is a shifty business? WHAT??
item.dc:creator: WeirdAlisMySpiritUserName

item.title: The Statue of Liberty has chains at her feet, to represent the end of slavery.
item.description: Originally, she was holding the chains in her hand instead of a tablet. The statue’s designer, Edouard de Laboulaye, was a staunch abolitionist. However, his financial backers didn’t want to make waves with an overtly political statement like “Black people should not be purchased and sold like animals,” so to get funding, he had to hide the chains. Most people today aren’t aware that the chains exist at all, and assume that the statue was to celebrate America in general. Edit: Thank you, @LadyGagaAteYourBaby - https://www.nps.gov/stli/learn/historyculture/abolition.htm And WTF, Imgur? I tagged this with “Black History Month.” How you gonna do my post dirty like that?
item.dc:creator: wadatahmydamie

item.title: It's time for Funny Friday! A little humor to end the work week
item.description:
If you know, you know. As always I link to a private album with some of the more risque jokes and memes I've acquired. This time there are quite a few of those, so make sure to look for the link to bonus content in the comments.
Well, that's one way to get passengers to pay attention to in-flight announcements!
Pretty sure Wilford has the right answer to this question.
Yeah, this is definitely the hardest I've ever seen Robert Frost go.
Damn inflation! It's even tainted the free candy van. Is nothing safe?!
Sometimes there's a good reason they're locked away in an isolated tower.
Now we can't even see what he's being distracted by.
Now you've done it. You gave Moon Moon a way to really communicate their thoughts.
If you try to do it and fall off or break something, you'll win a No-Belle prize.
Et tu, Doggo?
No malarkey here.
"Be not afraid... of my snapchat filter."
I think I need a... break... after hearing about this person's spinal fantasy.
Every goddamn time!
There's a reason why nobody fucks with the white mage... and why the bad guys try to kill him first.
Your odds of getting hacked are going into the Danger Zone.
It's not you, Satan, it's me.
The Breakfast Club in my pants. (Perfect for when you wake up hungry or horny)
Objectively the correct response.
The barista has had enough of your shit, Steve!
Sometimes cliches have an element of truth in them.
Watch what you say or they'll put out your lights!
Perfect. No notes.
Stand even closer if you know you have a shotgun.
Ever read or watch a story and just know that a particular character is just the author trauma dumping?
Work it, guys!
Just a little bit of good feelings mixed in.
How embarrassing for the bird. Getting up early just to get humiliated by the prey.
Always treat the milfs with respect. (Unless they want to be treated disrespectfully...)
It turns out that fishnets don't ALWAYS make things look sexier.
He's a lethal weapon!
*Facepalm*
You're going to be feeling and regretting those super size fries when you're running extra miles.
I don't have a cat and my dog crossed the rainbow bridge last summer, so this is the closest you get to a cat or dog tax.
item.dc:creator: politicalwanderer

item.title: It’s an unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
romantic
i wonder if people will remember my dumps
gonna guess that doing all this is highly therapeutic
everything?
progress
not sure who gets more songs, Stevie or Goonie
I don’t drink anymore but if I did I would have to avoid tequila
mmm hmm
gross
plane within a plane.. genius
deal with it
so in addition to being the spawn of Satan himself, southpaws have to deal with this shit
as is tradition
that IS her, right?
hard agree
that doesn’t sound good
that's my set.. have a great weekend gang!!

item.title: I know I shouldnt have been but I was so nervous and ashamed to go
item.description: This new year didnt start the way I was hoping, I have been applying for jobs with no luck while trying to keep things together. Left a homophobic physically abusive family to turn pages in my life. Made a post 3 weeks ago venting about everything, got an extremely supportive response. It really did make an impact on my well-being so for that I am very grateful. Thank you for all the support. https://imgur.com/gallery/LHjVAek

item.title: A BIG OLE' WHAT THE FRUCK AT WORK THIS WEEK...
item.description:
I'm laid back at work, avoid the limelight, don't need to be the star of the show, unlike some of my teammates.
This guy is so professional and well-grounded, he's so much better than this position. WTF is he doing here?
I've had little else to do for 6 months than comb through the written procedures and do improvements. No one asked me to so I haven't officially published anything, but this is my bread-and-butter so I'm confident in my work.
A friend recommended me to a job a his company, and they offered me a spot with a 20%+ raise. Duh, I said yes.
Ugh. So this other guy.... he's been actively trying to get me fired for months because he's all flash and carrot-chasing, and I just get shit done right in the sidelines and am actually useful, and after the initial awe wore off from his 'brilliance' I was getting more accolades, and for some reason he just decided to take that personally?
She isn't a peach herself, half the problem really, but at least this time she's doing the right thing.
Misogynist Guy and Mr. Racist get to meet with HR on Monday. For two hours. Each.
He's maybe more pissed off about the whole thing than I am, though he just started and it's been nothing but red flags from Day 1 for him. Our old manager quit right after hiring him, before he started even.
The stupid is unending, I'm shocked I could tolerate it this long.
What they did is... uhh.... an actual crime.... so...... way to make a bad situation go from disciplinary to a prosecutable federal crime, guys.
They're 80% of the reason the job is as difficult as it is, because they're loud AND dumb, but the loud is considered a virtue here so the dumb was tolerated. I'm not loud so I was considered underperforming when I'm actually half the reason the whole department runs. The other half is a senior member of the team who has no fucks to give because he's smarter and better rhan everyone. And he's a great guy.
I'm so done with this drama. I haven't seen shit like this since high school and I'm nearly 40. Between the "speak up more even if it's asinie" metric of performance that just mystifies me, and the blatant sexism/racism/stupidity that permeates every single team..... I'm glad to be going back to an industry with accountability and actual definable contract requirements. Everyone is openly antagonistic here. I've never worked a place where that was not only tolerated but lowkey encouraged. I'm probably a bit shocked that there's consequences for these guys at all. Trainee must be well-connected. Anyway, that's just me shouting into the void. Thanks for listening to my petty bullshit. Do me a couple favors: hug your loves ones, and make sure you're registered to vote. EDIT: The "Don't Vote" bot has visited here, and it can go fuck itself. GQP and Maga and Trumpers can all go fuck yourselves. Putin is a liar and a murderer. SLAVA UKRANI! Vote! Vote for your rights, your environment, your future, and your freedoms! No one will give them to you, you have to make them! Fight the oppressors who lie, who want you to be afraid of your fellows, remember who the real enemy is.
item.dc:creator: ViscousCousCous

item.title: Goodbye Bug, my once in a lifetime dog. Thank you for finding me when I needed you the most
item.description:
her last walk
all smiles, even at the end
the last pic I took of her
trying to accept the inevitable
some precious outside time before she had to go
I will miss you for the rest of my life

item.description: Only 25 hours. But making $10 at Pizza Hut. First check in over 2 years. Feels good guys! Do you remember your first check from your first job?

item.title: I want to make this quilt but my bf hates it. Opinions?
item.description: It brings me joy but it offends my partner's retinas. Just curious what the general consensus is. Pure genius? Tomfoolery? I have like 20 projects going so I probably won't make it anyways. And white doesn't fare well in our home. Buuuut, just maybeeeee....

item.description:
Stargate - https://imgur.com/gallery/nXYrraP Star Trek TOS - https://imgur.com/gallery/4SPJxyX TNG - https://imgur.com/gallery/CMgsCIy DS9 - https://imgur.com/gallery/S8ISUlZ VOY - https://imgur.com/gallery/YDc2PD2 ENT - https://imgur.com/gallery/ov74iIE
Hudson Leick
with Tony Todd (aka Candyman)
Michael Hurst (who played Iolaus) also directed several episodes
RIP Kevin Smith
Karl Urban
Stuntwoman Zoë Bell, she doubled for Lucy on the series (and for Uma Thurman in KILL BILL)
Anthony Starr

item.title: Images of Note: t i n y box
item.description:
i hate this because this describes me
BUZZ IS JEM HADAR!
help them
This means that the following are KDE projects: * Kirk Cameron. * Kazakhstan. * Krokodil
someone should use an AI voice changer to change all the male voicelines in HL2 to Markiplier
this is the most 90s thing I have ever read
I watched the video and the guy dropped to the floor like the Taliban just set of an IED.
:o
In the dark cyberpunk future, they use Arch, clearly.
.. / .-.. --- ...- . / .... --- .-- / .. / -.- -. --- .-- / -- --- .-. ... . / -.-. --- -.. .
Fun fact, cats do this because when they poop or pee they're vulnerable, and thus they want to protect you
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
